right-pagetranslation: Calaamadee noocyada bogagga si loo turjumo
tps-edit-sourcepage-text:
Waxaad tafatiraysaa bogga isha tarjumaadda. Fadlan hubi inaad taqaan dukumentiyada soo socda:

* [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Extension:Translate/Page_translation_administration#Changing_the_source_text Beddelidda qoraalka isha]
* [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Extension:Translate/Page_translation_administration#Markup_examples Tusaalooyinka calaamadeynta ee la isticmaalo]
tps-edit-sourcepage-ve-warning-limited-t: Qaar ka mid ah qaybaha la turjumi karo lagama yaabo in lagu tafatiri karo tifaftirahan. Fadlan u isticmaal tifaftiraha isha si aad u tafatirto qaybahaas.
tpt-section-new:
Qayb cusub oo tarjumaad ah.
Magac: $1
tpt-sections-oldnew: Qaybaha tarjumaadda cusub iyo kuwa jira
tpt-badtitle: Magaca bogga la bixiyay ($1) ma aha cinwaan sax ah
tpt-oldrevision:
$2 ma aha nuqulkii ugu dambeeyay ee bogga [[:$1]].
Kaliya nuquladii ugu dambeeyay ayaa loo calaamadin karaa tarjumaad.
tpt-notsuitable:
Bogga $1 kuma habboona tarjumaad.
Hubi inuu leeyahay summadaha $2 oo uu leeyahay hab qoraal sax ah.
tpt-saveok: Bogga [[:$1]] waxaa loo calaamadeeyay tarjumaad iyadoo leh $2 {{PLURAL:$2|qayb tarjumaad|qaybo tarjumaad}}. Bogga hadda waa la [$3 tarjumi karaa].
tpt-saveok-first: Waxaad boggan ka [[Special:PageMigration|soo dejisan kartaa tarjumaad hore u jirtay]] (haddii ay jirto).
tpt-offer-notify: Waxaad [$1 ogeysiin kartaa turjubaanada] ku saabsan boggan.
tpt-showpage-intro:
Hoos waxaa ku qoran qaybaha tarjumaadda cusub, kuwa jira iyo kuwa la tirtiray.
Ka hor intaadan calaamadin nuqulkan tarjumaad, hubi in isbeddellada lagu sameeyay qaybaha tarjumaadda la yareeyay si looga fogaado shaqo aan loo baahnayn oo ku timaadda turjubaanada.
tpt-duplicate: Magaca qaybta tarjumaadda $1 waxaa la isticmaalay in ka badan hal mar.
tpt-invalid: Magaca qaybta tarjumaadda $1 waa inuusan ka koobnaan hoosta xarriiqda ama calaamadda kala qaybinta.
tpt-unit-title-too-long: Magaca qaybta tarjumaadda $1 aad ayuu u dheer yahay. Dhererka isku darka cinwaanka bogga la turjumi karo oo leh horgalaha magaca bannaan, magaca qaybta tarjumaadda iyo koodhka luuqadda waa $2 {{PLURAL:$2|bayt|baytyada}}, kaas oo ka dheer dhererka ugu badan ee la taageerayo oo ah $3 {{PLURAL:$3|bayt|baytyada}}. Gaabi magaca qaybta tarjumaadda (haddii la habeeyay) ama [[Special:MovePage/$4|u beddel magaca bogga la turjumi karo]] magac ka gaaban si tarjumaaddu u shaqayso.
tpt-unmarked: Bogga [[:$1]] mar dambe looma calaamadin tarjumaad ahaan.
tpt-list-nopages: Ma jiraan bogag loo calaamadeeyay tarjumaad ama diyaar u ah in loo calaamadeeyo tarjumaad.
tpt-new-pages:
{{PLURAL:$1|Boggan wuxuu ka kooban yahay|Bogaggani waxay ka kooban yihiin}} qoraal leh calaamadaha tarjumaadda,
laakiin hadda ma jiro nuqul ka mid ah {{PLURAL:$1|boggan oo|bogaggan oo}} loo calaamadeeyay tarjumaad.
tpt-old-pages: Nooca ugu dambeeya ee {{PLURAL:$1|boggan|bogaggan}} waxaa loo calaamadeeyay turjumaad.
tpt-other-pages:
{{PLURAL:$1|Nuqul hore oo boggan ah ayaa|Nuqullo hore oo bogaggan ah ayaa}} loo calaamadeeyay tarjumaad,
laakiin {{PLURAL:$1|nuqulkii ugu dambeeyay|nuqulladii ugu dambeeyay}} lama calaamadin karo tarjumaad.
tpt-outdated-pages: {{PLURAL:$1|Boggan wuxuu leeyahay|Bogaggani waxay leeyihiin}} isbeddello aan loo calaamadin tarjumaad.
tpt-proposed-state-pages: {{PLURAL:$1|Boggan waxaa soo jeediyay|Bogaggan waxaa soo jeediyay}} tifaftirayaasha si loo turjumo.
tpt-tag-no-transclusion-support: ma jiro taageero ku darid bog
tpt-select-prioritylangs-force: Ka hor istaag tarjumaadaha luuqadaha aan ahayn luuqadaha mudnaanta leh
tpt-select-no-prioritylangs-force: Ka hor istaagga tarjumaadaha luuqadaha aan mudnaanta lahayn adigoon dooran wax luuqado mudnaan leh ah wuxuu ka hor istaagi doonaa tarjumaadaha dhammaan luuqadaha.
tpt-syntaxversion-text: Boggan hadda wuxuu isticmaalaa nooc hore oo hab qoraalka isha bogga la turjumi karo ah. Nooca cusub wuxuu ku duubi doonaa qaybaha aan la turjumin summad HTML ah si loo muujiyo luuqadda saxda ah ee qoraalka. Tusaale: $1. Waxaad isticmaali kartaa hab qoraalka cusub ee calaamadeynta $2 si looga hortago duubis nooc kasta ah meelaha aan ku habboonayn, sida marka la turjumayo astaanta title ee curiye. Suurtagal ma aha in dib loogu noqdo nooc hore oo hab-qoraal ah.
tpt-syntaxversion-label: U isticmaal nooca ugu dambeeyay ee hab qoraalka boggan
tpt-transclusion-label: Daar ku darista tusmada ee fahamsan tarjumaadda boggan
tpt-transclusion-help: Haddii la hawlgeliyo, bogagga ku daraya boggan sida template ahaan waxay beddelkeeda ku dari doonaan tarjumaadda ku qoran luuqadda bogga ku daraya (ama luuqadda isha haddii tarjumaaddaas aysan weli jirin). Tusaale ahaan, haddii aad isku daydo inaad boggan ku darto bog ku qoran luuqadda Jarmalka, wuxuu ku dari doonaa bogga "$1" halkii. Tani si la isku halayn karo ayey u shaqaysaa haddii bogagga ku daraya ay sidoo kale isticmaalaan tarjumaadda bogagga, laakiin way fashilmi kartaa haddii si gacanta ah loo turjumo. Dami dejintan haddii boggu iskiis u maamulo tarjumaadda (tusaale ahaan si uu u taageero bogag gacanta loo turjumay, ama loo isticmaalo luuqadda is-dhexgalka halkii luuqadda bogga), sababtoo ah haddii kale wikitext-ka bogga laftiisa gebi ahaanba waa la iska indho tiri doonaa marka lagu darayo. Dejintan wax saameyn ah kuma laha haddii bogga aan waligiis lagu darin bogag kale.
tpt-rev-mark-tooltip: U calaamadee nuqulka ugu dambeeyay ee boggan tarjumaad ahaan.
tpt-rev-discourage-tooltip: Ka niyad jabin tarjumaadaha dambe ee boggan.
tpt-rev-encourage-tooltip: Ku soo celi boggan tarjumaadda caadiga ah.
tpt-prepare-page-tooltip: U diyaari boggan in loo calaamadeeyo tarjumaad
tpt-translation-settings-subtitle: Xogta boggani ma tahay mid deggan oo diyaar u ah tarjumaada bulshada?
tpt-translation-settings-ignore: Nuxurka looma talagelin in la turjumo
tpt-translation-settings-ignore-hint: Tani kuma dari doonto boggan liiska tarjumaadda bulshada.
tpt-translation-settings-unstable-hint: Tani waxay hakad gelin doontaa ku darista boggan liiska tarjumaadda bulshada.
tpt-translation-settings-propose: Nuxurku waa xasilloon yahay waana diyaar
tpt-translation-settings-propose-hint: Tani waxay ku dari doontaa boggan liiska tarjumaadda bulshada.
tpt-translation-settings-unstable-notice: Nuxurka boggu weli ma aha mid xasilloon oo ku filan in loo calaamadeeyo tarjumaad.
tpt-translation-settings-ignored-notice: Tifaftirayaashu waxay muujiyeen in boggan aan loo calaamadin tarjumaad.
tpt-translation-settings-proposed-editor: Maamulayaasha tarjumaadda ayaa lagu talin doonaa inay boggan u calaamadeeyaan tarjumaad. Waxaad ku biiri kartaa tarjumaadaha marka ay bogga u calaamadeeyaan tarjumaad.
tpt-translation-settings-proposed-pagetr: Tifaftirayaashu waxay muujiyeen in boggan loo calaamadeeyo tarjumaad. Waxaad [$1 calaamadin kartaa bogga] adigoo [$2 tafatiraya] ama isticmaalaya [$3 {{#Special:PagePreparation}}].
translate-tag-markthisagain: Boggan wuxuu leeyahay [$1 isbeddel] tan iyo markii ugu dambaysay ee [$2 loo calaamadeeyay tarjumaad].
translate-tag-hasnew: Boggan wuxuu ka kooban yahay [$1 isbeddel] oo aan loo calaamadin tarjumaad.
tpt-translation-intro: Boggan waa [$1 nooc la turjumay] oo ka mid ah bogga [[$2]], turjumaadduna waa $3% dhammaystiran.
tpt-translation-intro-fuzzy: Tarjumaadaha duugoobay waxaa lagu calaamadeeyaa sidan.
tpt-target-page:
Boggan lama cusboonaysiin karo gacanta.
Boggan waa tarjumaad ka timid bogga [[$1]], tarjumaaddana waxaa lagu cusboonaysiin karaa iyadoo la adeegsanayo [$2 qalabka tarjumaadda].
tpt-unknown-page:
Meel magaca waxaa loo qoondeeyay tarjumaadaha bogagga nuxurka.
Bogga aad isku dayayso inaad tafatirto uma muuqdo inuu la xiriiro bog loo calaamadeeyay tarjumaad.
tpt-translation-restricted-no-reason: Tarjumaadda boggan ee luuqaddan waxaa laga hor istaagay maamule tarjumaad.
tpt-translation-restricted-no-priority-l: Kooxdan fariimaha waxaa loo dejiyay inay ka hortagto tarjumaadaha luuqadaha aan ahayn luuqadaha mudnaanta leh, laakiin ma laha luuqado mudnaan leh.
tpt-discouraged-language-force-content: Maamule tarjumaad ayaa go'aamiyay in boggan lagu tarjumi karo oo keliya $1.
tpt-discouraged-language-header: Tarjumaadda $1 ma aha mudnaan u leh boggan.
tpt-discouraged-language-content: Maamule tarjumaad ayaa go'aamiyay in dadaallada tarjumaadda lagu saleeyo $1.
tpt-discouraged-language-force: Boggan looma tarjumi karo $2. Maamule tarjumaad ayaa go'aamiyay in boggan lagu tarjumi karo oo keliya $3.
tpt-priority-languages: Maamule tarjumaad ayaa u dejiyay luuqadaha mudnaanta leh ee kooxdan $1.
tpt-priority-languages-force: Maamule tarjumaad ayaa u dejiyay luuqadaha mudnaanta leh ee kooxdan $1. Tarjumaadaha luuqado kale lama oggola.
tpt-discouraged-translation-header: Tarjumaadda boggan waa laga niyad jabiyay
tpt-discouraged-translation-content: Maamule tarjumaad ayaa ka niyad jabiyay tarjumaadda boggan. Weli waad tarjumi kartaa bogga, laakiin tarjumaaduhu waxaa laga yaabaa inaysan faa'iido lahayn.
tpt-render-summary: Cusboonaysiinta si loogu waafajiyo nooca cusub ee bogga isha.
tpt-aggregategroup-add-new: Ku dar koox cusub oo la isu geeyay
tpt-aggregategroup-remove-confirm: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad tirtirto kooxdan la isu geeyay?
pt-parse-open:
Calaamadda <translate> ma leh isku dheelitirnaan. Qaabka tarjumaadda: 
$1
pt-parse-close:
Calaamadda </translate> ma leh isku dheelitirnaan. Tusmada tarjumaadda: 
$1
pt-parse-nested:
Qaybaha tarjumaadda <translate> ee isku dhex jira lama oggola. Qoraalka summadda: 
$1
pt-shake-multiple:
Calaamado badan oo unugyo tarjumaad ah ayaa loo sameeyay hal unug tarjumaad. Hubi in unugyada tarjumaadda lagu kala saaro xariijimo bannaan. Qoraalka unugga tarjumaadda: 
$1
pt-shake-position:
Calaamadaha unugga tarjumaadda waxay ku jiraan meel aan la filayn. Qoraalka unugga tarjumaadda: 
$1
pt-shake-empty: Unug tarjumaad oo madhan oo loogu talagalay calaamadda "$1".
log-description-pagetranslation: Diiwaanka falalka la xiriira nidaamka tarjumaadda bogga
logentry-pagetranslation-moveok: $1 {{GENDER:$2|dhammeeyay}} dib u magacaabista bogga la tarjumi karo $3 oo loo beddelay $4
logentry-pagetranslation-movenok: $1 {{GENDER:$2|la kulmay}} dhibaato intii bogga $3 loo wareejiyay $4
logentry-pagetranslation-deletefnok: $1 {{GENDER:$2|fashilantay}} tirtirista $3 oo ka tirsan bogga la tarjumi karo $4
logentry-pagetranslation-deletelnok: $1 {{GENDER:$2|fashilantay}} tirtirista $3 oo ka tirsan bogga tarjumaadda $4
logentry-pagetranslation-prioritylanguag: $1 {{GENDER:$2|ka saaray}} luuqadaha mudnaanta leh bogga la tarjumi karo $3
$1 {{GENDER:$2|dejiyay}} luuqadaha mudnaanta leh ee bogga la tarjumi karo $3 kuwaas oo ah $5
$1 {{GENDER:$2|xaddiday}} luuqadaha loo oggol yahay bogga la tarjumi karo $3 kuwaas oo ah $5
logentry-pagetranslation-associate: $1 {{GENDER:$2|ku daray}} bogga la tarjumi karo $3 kooxda la isu geeyay $4
logentry-pagetranslation-dissociate: $1 {{GENDER:$2|ka saaray}} bogga la tarjumi karo $3 kooxda la isu geeyay $4
log-action-filter-pagetranslation-priori: Wax ka beddelka luuqadaha mudnaanta leh
log-action-filter-pagetranslation-aggreg: Wax ka beddelka kooxaha la isu geeyay
log-description-messagebundle: Diiwaanka falalka la xiriira nidaamka kooxaha fariimaha
logentry-messagebundle-moveok: $1 {{GENDER:$2|dhammeeyay}} dib u magacaabista kooxda fariimaha $3 oo loo beddelay $4
logentry-messagebundle-movenok: $1 {{GENDER:$2|la kulmay}} dhibaato intii kooxda fariimaha $3 loo wareejiyay $4
logentry-messagebundle-deletefnok: $1 {{GENDER:$2|fashilantay}} tirtirista $3 oo ka tirsan kooxda fariimaha $4
pt-cta-mark-translation: Boggaan waxaa lagu calaamadayn karaa  turjumaadda bulshada. Hagaajinta [$1 dooqyada turjumaadda bogga] si aad u ogaysiiso tifaftirayaasha in ay bilaabi karaan turjumaadda waxa ku jira.
pt-movepage-blockers: Bogga la tarjumi karo looma rari karo magac cusub sababo la xiriira {{PLURAL:$1|khaladka|khaladaadka}} soo socda:
pt-movepage-block-base-invalid: Magaca bogga la tarjumi karo ee loo rarayo ma aha cinwaan sax ah.
pt-movepage-block-tp-invalid: Cinwaanka bogga tarjumaadda ee "[[:$1]]" waa aan ansax ahayn (ma aad u dheer yahay?).
pt-movepage-block-section-invalid: Cinwaanka bogga bartilmaameedka ee "[[:$1]]" ee unugga tarjumaadda ma saxna (ma aad buu u dheer yahay?).
pt-movepage-block-subpage-invalid: Cinwaanka bog-hoosaadka ee "[[:$1]]" waa aan ansax ahayn (ma aad u dheer yahay?).
pt-movepage-block-talkpage-invalid: Cinwaanka bogga wada hadalka bartilmaameedka ee "[[:$1]]" ma saxna (ma aad buu u dheer yahay?).
pt-movepage-block-unknown-page: Bogga ([[:$1]]) la rarayo uma muuqdo inuu qayb ka yahay bogga la tarjumi karo.
pt-movepage-block-ns-talk-unsupported: Bogga ([[:$1]]) waxaa loo rarayaa meel magaceed aan taageerin bogagga wada hadalka.
pt-movepage-block-rename-failed: Waxaa dhacay khalad intii la sameynayay cinwaan cusub oo loogu talagalay bogga [[:$1]]
pt-movepage-list-source: Bogga asalka ah ee la tarjumi karo
pt-movepage-list-nonmovable: {{PLURAL:$1|bog hoosaad|bogag hoosaadyo}} aan la wareejin karin
pt-movepage-list-nonmovable-note: {{PLURAL:$1|bog hoosaad|bogag hoosaadyada}} soo socda lama wareejin karo.
pt-movepage-list-translatable-note: Bogaggan waa in si gooni ah loo wareejiyaa.
pt-movepage-list-count: Wadarta guud waa $1 {{PLURAL:$1|bog|bogag}} oo ay ku jiraan $2 {{PLURAL:$2|bog hoosaad|bogag hoosaadyo}} iyo $3 {{PLURAL:$3|bog wada hadal|bogag wada hadal}} oo la wareejinayo.
pt-movepage-page-count-limit: Boggan la tarjumi karo wuxuu ka kooban yahay in ka badan $1 {{PLURAL:$1|bog|bogag}}. Rarista tiradan bogagga ah waxaa la ogaaday inay tahay mid aan lagu kalsoonaan karin. Fadlan la xiriir maamule nidaam si uu tan ugu sameeyo qoraal dayactir.
pt-movepage-subpages-blocked-exist: Wareeji dhammaan bogag-hoosaadyada (ka bood bogag hoosaadyada la xannibay)
pt-movepage-intro:
Boggan gaarka ah wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad wareejiso bogagga loo calaamadeeyay tarjumaadda.
Falka wareejintu ma noqon doono mid degdeg ah, sababtoo ah bogag badan ayaa u baahan doona in la wareejiyo.
Inta bogagga la wareejinayo, suurtagal ma aha in lala falgalo bogagga ay arrintu khusayso.
Khaladaadka waxaa lagu diiwaangelin doonaa [[$1|diiwaanka]], waxaana loo baahan doonaa in gacanta lagu saxo.
pt-movepage-logreason: Qayb ka mid ah bogga la tarjumi karo "[[$1]]"
pt-movepage-started: Fadlan hubi [[$1|diiwaanka]] wax yar kadib si aad u aragto khaladaadka iyo fariinta dhammaystirka.
pt-leave-redirect: U daa dib u jiheen bogga la tarjumi karo, bogag hoosaadyada iyo bogagga wada hadalka la xiriira
pt-leave-redirect-label: $1 (dib u jeedin waa la dayn karaa)
pt-locked-page: Boggan waa la qufulay sababtoo ah bogga la turjumi karo hadda waa la wareejiyay.
pt-deletepage-invalid-title: Bogga la tilmaamay sax ma aha.
pt-deletepage-invalid-text: Bogga la tilmaamay ma aha bog la turjumi karo, mana aha bog turjumaad ah.
pt-deletepage-any-legend: Tirtir bogga la turjumi karo, xidhmada fariimaha ama bogga turjumaadda
pt-deletepage-list-count: Wadar ahaan waxaa la tirtirayaa $1 {{PLURAL:$1|bog|boggag}} iyo $2 {{PLURAL:$2|bog hoosaad|boggag hoosaad}}.
pt-deletepage-full-logreason: Qayb ka mid ah bogga la turjumi karo "$1"
pt-deletepage-lang-logreason: Qayb ka mid ah bogga turjumaadda "$1"
pt-deletepage-lang-outdated-logreason: Boggu mar dambe ma laha wax tarjumaado ah
pt-deletepage-started: Fadlan hubi [[$1|diiwaanka]] si aad u aragto khaladaadka iyo fariinta dhammaystirka.
pt-deletepage-intro:
Boggan gaarka ah wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad tirtirto bog la tarjumi karo oo dhan, kooxda fariimaha, ama bog tarjumaad gaar ah oo ku qoran luuqad.
Falka tirtiristu ma noqon doono mid degdeg ah, sababtoo ah dhammaan bogagga ku tiirsan iyaga sidoo kale waa la tirtiri doonaa.
Khaladaadka waxaa lagu diiwaangelin doonaa [[$1|diiwaanka ku habboon]], waxaana loo baahan doonaa in gacanta lagu saxo.
pagemigration-summary: Sheeg bog tarjumaad oo soo celi tarjumaad kasta oo la sameeyay ka hor inta nidaamka Turjum laga hawlgelin boggaas.
pm-extra-units-warning: Waxaa jiri kara unugyo dheeraad ah. Fadlan si sax ah isugu waafaji unugyada asalka ah iyo unugyada tarjumaadda.
pm-pagetitle-invalid: U guurista bogagga tarjumaadda waxay ka shaqaysaa oo keliya bogagga tarjumaadda, tusaale ahaan "Bog/so". Cinwaanka la bixiyay ma aha cinwaan sax ah.
pm-langcode-missing: U guurista bogagga tarjumaadda waxay ka shaqaysaa oo keliya bogagga tarjumaadda, tusaale ahaan "Bog/so". Cinwaanka la bixiyay ma aha bog tarjumaad.
pm-summary-import: Tarjumaad ayaa la soo dejiyay iyadoo la adeegsanayo [[Special:PageMigration|guuritaanka bogga]]
pm-on-import-message-text: Tarjumaadihii hore ayaa la soo dejiyay. Isticmaal ikhtiyaarrada ku dar, beddel iyo tirtir si aad u hagaajiso unugyada tarjumaadda, kadibna guji badhanka "{{int:pm-savepages-button-label}}" si aad u kaydiso. Guji badhanka "{{int:pm-cancel-button-label}}" si aad u tuurto isbeddellada.
pm-pagetitle-not-translatable: $1 kama mid aha bog la tarjumi karo.
pm-translation-unit-fetch-failed: Waxaa dhacay qalad intii la soo qaadanayay unugyada tarjumaadda ee bogga.
pagepreparation-summary: Sheeg cinwaan bog oo loo diyaariyo tarjumaad.
pp-save-message: Bogga waa la daabacay. Waxaad [$1 wax ka beddeli] kartaa.
pp-prepare-message: Bogga waxaa loo diyaariyay tarjumaad. Hoos ka eeg kala duwanaanta. Guji badhanka "{{int:pp-save-button-label}}" haddii ay sax tahay!
pp-already-prepared-message: Waxay u muuqataa in bogga hore loogu diyaariyay tarjumaad, ama aan si toos ah loo diyaarin karin. Ma jiraan wax isbeddello ah marka loo eego nuqulkii hore.
pp-diff-error: Waxaa dhacay qalad intii laga soo qaadanayay kala duwanaanta server-ka.
pp-unexpected-error: Waxaa dhacay qalad intii la farsamaynayay codsigaaga
tpt-fuzzy-select-label: U baahan cusboonaysiinta tarjumaadda ee unugyada la tafatiray
tpt-validation-not-insertable: Magaca doorsoomaha tarjumaadda "$1" kuma shaqaynayo gelin la isticmaali karo oo ku jirta isdhexgalka tarjumaadda. Ka fogow isticmaalka calaamadaha gaarka ah.
tpt-validation-name-reuse: Doorsoomaha tarjumaadda "$1" ayaa lagu qeexay dhowr jeer iyadoo leh nuxur kala duwan. Beddel magacyada doorsoomayaasha si ay u noqdaan kuwo gaar ah gudaha unugga tarjumaadda.
visualeditor-annotations-translate-descr: Xadkan waxaa loo calaamadeeyay in la tarjumi karo. Fadlan hubi inaad raacdo tilmaamaha lagu bixiyay [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help:Extension:Translate/Page_translation_administration#Changing_the_source_text beddelidda qoraalka asalka ah].
visualeditor-annotations-tvar-start: Bilowga nuxurka aan la tarjumi karin
visualeditor-annotations-tvar-end: Dhammaadka nuxurka aan la tarjumi karin
visualeditor-annotations-tvar-descriptio: Xadkan waxaa loo calaamadeeyay inuusan ahayn mid la tarjumi karo. Fadlan tixraac [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help:Extension:Translate/Page_translation_administration#Segmentation kala qaybinta qoraalka asalka ah] si aad u hesho macluumaad dheeraad ah.
tag-translate-translation-pages-descript: Wax ka beddellada otomaatiga ah ee bogagga tarjumaadda ee ay samayso kordhinta Turjum
